resources.string: Tap the button below or use the + button to pick an OFD file from your device.
Failed to load the OFD document. Please make sure the file is a valid OFD file.

OFDRW Viewer v2.3.9

An OFD document viewer powered by the OFDRW open-source library and ofd.js.

Supports English and Arabic (عربي).

https://github.com/ofdrw/ofdrw
